title: fraxinus urophylla
intro: Fraxinus urophylla, also known as the Urophylla ash tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is native to parts of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus urophylla include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and in some cultures, it is also used to make a medicinal decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water.
